description: On Linux, `aspire certs clean` now completes successfully even when `certutil` is unavailable, treating NSS database cleanup as best-effort rather than a hard failure. `aspire doctor` also reports a warning when `certutil` is missing, suggesting installation of the distribution's NSS tools package (e.g., `libnss3-tools`) for full browser certificate trust.
name: Linux certificate cleanup handles missing NSS tools gracefully
